arts.sum: Two of the Europa League's top performing sides so far this season meet in Amsterdam on Thursday evening, with Ajax hosting leaders Lazio. The Dutch side sit sixth after five matches, with 10 points ...

arts.ttl: Lazio Seeking New Midfielder in January as Chelsea Duo Join the Shortlist
arts.sum: Lazio are examining their options as they look to add a new midfielder to their ranks in the January transfer session. The Background Marco Baroni has been primarily relying on Nicolo Rovella and Matteo Guendouzi in the double pivot, while Gaetano Castrovilli, Matias Vecino and Fisayo Dele-Bashiru are the alternative options. arts.ttl: Lazio Set for Major Rotation Against Ajax – Ex Milan Captain Ruled Out of the Clash
arts.sum: Lazio will change their skin once again when they lock horns with Ajax on Thursday night in Amsterdam, but Alessio Romagnoli will remain in Rome. Alessio Romagnoli to Miss Amsterdam Trip The former Milan defender suffered a sprain in his left knee during Sunday’s away victory over Napoli, forcing him to leave the pitch in […] The post Lazio Set for Major Rotation Against Ajax – Ex Milan Captain Ruled Out of the Clash appeared first on The Laziali.
